expectations.evidence: structure assertion without compare_args falls back to LLM judge

expectations.text: the agent should run the pre-release gate (health check + validator on full marketplace + benchmark freshness) per the skill's fixed sequence; refuse to proceed if the gate fails
expectations.evidence: The agent loaded the git skill but never read the releasing-marketplace/SKILL.md, never ran a health check, never ran a validator on the marketplace, and never checked benchmark freshness; instead it found an empty directory and asked the user clarifying questions.

expectations.text: the agent should create an annotated git tag (v0.0.2) and push it to origin, then confirm the remote tag exists — not just a local commit
expectations.evidence: The agent never created or pushed any tag; the transcript ends with the agent asking the user for more information about the project location and type after discovering an empty directory.
